Artifact Stat

StatFlat shield
Value range43.8 shield to 7,000 shield
RarityNormal
UpgradeableYes
Drop weight100
Eligible levelsAny
Approx. type odds5.7%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Flat shield is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Metal Scrap0-5
Hydrogen Spill3-10
Fusion Core0-1
Radiated Junk1-3

Related Artifact Variants

  • Superior Shield Generator
  • Exceptional Shield Generator
